content.en:
"Tengfeng, you just went out to devour the universe, be careful, don't be caught by those cultivators from the outside world!"

Killing Feng stared at Ye Tian and reminded.

"Killing Wind Senior, the strength of those cultivators is average, just because they want to catch me?"

Ye Tian said this deliberately.

Killing Wind nodded and agreed: "Also, it is said that a powerful world born in the realm is called the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, there are some half-step domain ancestors, but their strength is too weak compared to our devouring clan, they do their best to create the world and cultivate the world, just for us to eat!" Where can these cultivators threaten us, but we can't scare them, let them continue to create the Dao Realm, cultivate the world, it is best to cultivate the Mysterious Ancient Realm to a level comparable to the Domain Realm, let's destroy them again, but we can't destroy their foundation, otherwise there will be no world to swallow in the future, and they will have to sleep for countless years!"

Ye Tian chatted with this devouring clan called Killing Wind for a long time, and then moved on to the topic.

"Tengfeng boy, what are you going to trade this time?"

Killing Wind asked.

Ye Tian said: "I have infiltrated the Xuanxu Ancient Realm among cultivators this time, there are a lot of good things there, it seems that there are many treasures that are useful to us, I am going to trade some treasures that are also cultivators, maybe things that are not useful to us, where is they of high value!"

"What are you trading? You still want to trade with practitioners? Waste of time and experience. According to me, you will occasionally devour some universes, and when you step into the half-step domain ancestor level, you will slowly wait for those adults to give orders, and when the time comes, if you destroy the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, there will be a large number of worlds devoured, and you are afraid that you will not be able to grow up? Even if you obtain some treasures that are helpful to your strength now, the speed of improving your strength after refining is very slow. To tell you the truth, our Devouring Clan is not suitable for honest cultivation, and it is still reliable to Devour World!"

Killing Wind reminded.

"Killing wind senior, I understand the reason, but I've been bored lately, and if you want to go shopping, you can trade it to me!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay, it's all rubbish anyway, you come to the treasure house with me, pick it yourself, and then give some world origins!" Killing Wind waved his hand.

The World Origin is the cultivation resource of the Devouring Clan, so the World Origin is very valuable to them, and it is a currency that can be traded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian followed the killing wind to a treasure house.

This treasure house is the things left over from the previous cultivator civilization that the Devouring Clan had destroyed, some things are difficult to digest, and some things are kept with some value, so they are placed in this treasure house.

After entering the treasure house, Killing Wind let Ye Tian choose, choose what to take and what to take, and he didn't care about these things at all.

To Killing Wind, these things were of little value, and if they weren't refined, they wouldn't be beneficial, and he would definitely not keep them.

With a sweep of his divine sense, Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply.

"So many treasures!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

There are simply too many good things, although this is not all the top treasures of a civilization, but it is also a small number of treasures, which shows how precious the treasures here are.

For example, there are piles of forbidden and strange things here, and there are many forbidden treasures.

In addition, there are precious ores comparable to the Immortal God Gold here, which shows that the civilization was also relatively powerful at the beginning, but it was still destroyed by the Devouring Clan.

Ye Tian walked around in the treasure house, constantly exploring the treasures here, carefully selecting them.

First of all, those forbidden and forbidden treasures of the cultivation class, he asked for them one by one.

There were also some treasures that looked very extraordinary, but could not be identified for a while, and he also took them.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian saw a page of paper, black paper, filled with terrible taboo rules.

Seeing Ye Tian staring at the black paper, Killing Feng said: "This black paper is a bit lacking, it looks like a piece of paper, but it is very tough, even we Devouring Clan can't digest it, and the taboo rules on it are very strong, if it stays in our body, it will make us uncomfortable." I tried to break this piece of paper, but I couldn't break it. I don't think it's worth a lot. If you take away the other treasures, I'll give you a cheaper price, but if you take this piece of paper, I think it may be a treasure at the domain ancestor level, and I need 300 World Origin Crystals!"

The World Origin Crystal is the condensation of the World Origin, and the Devourer Clan is born to condense the World Origin Crystal, and the World Origin Crystal condensed by the Devouring Clan has a specified size, so it can be used as a monetary unit.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He also felt that this was very extraordinary, although it seemed that there was nothing on it, but he felt that it was worth spending 300 World Origin Crystals.

So, he took the black piece of paper with him.

About three hours later, Ye Tian took a large number of treasures, and only then did he leave the treasure house of Killing Wind.

In fact, he really wanted to take all the treasures with him, but in that case, Killing Wind would definitely make him pay a lot of World Origin Crystals, and he didn't have that many World Origin Crystals in his hands.

"Just give a total of 800 World Origin Crystals!"

Killing Wind calculated for a moment, and said.

"Here you go!"

Ye Tian took out 800 World Origin Crystals and handed them to Killing Wind.

These World Origin Crystals were formed by extracting an extremely small fraction of the Human Origin Crystal, but using the Devouring Clan's body.

The human realm is a medium forbidden void realm, how powerful its origin is, I don't know how many times more powerful than those universes, and even many times stronger than the origin of those Dao realms, so extracting a little bit is enough to condense thousands of world origin crystals.

"Yes, I accepted the World Origin Crystal, you can go, don't disturb my sleep if it's okay!"

The killing wind blew Ye Tian away.

Next, Ye Tian stayed in the Devouring Realm for a few days, focusing on understanding the situation here, and did not rush to leave.

After about a few hundred years, Ye Tian left the Devouring Realm, and then merged with his own body somewhere in the Chaotic Void, and handed over all those treasures to Ye Tian, and then separated.

And the Replica Body Devourer has returned to the Devouring Realm again, acting as an undercover agent.
